case_title: CAPITAL ONE BANK VS. ROBERT B RAZAVI et al

docket_entries.description: NON-SERVICE RETURN (SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF APR-11-2008 CONTINUED TO JUN-20-2008 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPT. 212. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR AUG-06-2008 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S). THE JUN-20-2008 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR AUG-06-2008 CONTINUED TO OCT-08-2008 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 212 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S). THE AUG-06-2008 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

PRE-TRIAL CALENDAR SWEEP, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE CALENDAR OF DEC-10-2008, OFF CALENDAR, DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION FILED (SWEEP)
